svg.title: HIDProxBox Enclosure — Design Options Overview
svg.text: Three enclosure options for board review · DVI-33 · April 2026
Flat print → stable on most printers
Best balance of visibility + desk space
All controls on angled top surface
22 mm height very tight — may require
Pi Zero 2 W or CM4 board
Option B (Desktop Puck) offers the best balance of display visibility, internal volume for
Pi + CH552T boards, compact desk footprint, and straightforward FDM printing. Options A and C remain valid
for workflows where desk width (A) or ultra-low profile (C) are the priority constraint.
HIDProxBox · Enclosure Design Concepts · DVI-33 · April 2026
